content: Postgres UNIQUE constraint on slug should consider case sensitivity: plain UNIQUE on text is case-sensitive ('Loja' != 'loja'), which allows near-duplicate slugs. citext extension (CREATE EXTENSION citext; column type citext) makes uniqueness and lookups case-insensitive while preserving original casing for display. Alternative: normalize slug to lowercase at write time and keep a plain UNIQUE constraint — simpler, no extension dependency, recommended for MVP.
